title: Verify Incentive Offer appears during cancellation flow
description: Test that if backend has offer enabled, user sees discount offer after clicking 'Cancel Anyway'
preconditions: Offer is activated in backend with 50% discount

steps.description: 1. Navigate to Trial Corner > Manage Trial

expected_result: Offer popup displays with discount (e.g., 'Lock in 50% off your first month now'), shows trust clause about payment starting after trial ends, 'Grab Offer' and 'Cancel Anyway' options shown
